text:
is an Evangelion Unit that first appeared in the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. It can also be known for Evangelion Final Stage name. It is piloted by Shinji Ikari. It is an evolution of Super Evangelion.

Profile

It is 120 meters tall and weights between 3500 to 4000 tons. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, Chapter 17 The four shoulder pylons are Quantum Wave Mirrors Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, Chapter 18 It was named by Misato after the transformation from Super Evangelion as they left NERV Japan and went in direction to Yomotsu Hirasaka Island. Misato named it like that in hope that the world may never need another Evangelion. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 15 

The four shoulder pylons are Quantum Wave mirrors act as a way to stop Shinji's heart from exploding, controling the energy that comes from the Third Impact. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 19 

Features

Time Break
Described as a black disc that is in the rear of the Evangelion Final Model. It can use the energy remaining of the Third Impact. Initially it had 0.82 seconds of the Third Impact left, and with each usage, it diminishes it. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 01 This energy is so immense that it is possible to bend space-time Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 04 Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 15 

Wings of Light
As giving command to fly, the four pylons change the position and move around the Time Break disc. Then, the wings comes out. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 5, chapter 15 

Weapons

Powered 8 Rifle
Loadout in the final mission.

Bizen Osafune sword
Loadout in the final mission.

Spear of Lucretius

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA

Development

The first action figure released based on the Evangelion Final Model was the Evangelion Evolution EV-017 Evangelion EVA-01 Final Model. This figure is part of the Evangelion Evolution line made by Revoltech, it was sculpted by Katsuhisa Yamaguchi.

A figure was announced at by Dragonhorse Inc. As part of the CCSTOYS MORTAL MIND series, the [CCSTOYS]] MORTAL MIND series https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gC7200201/ EVANGELION ANIMA Evangelion Final Model https://hobby.dengeki.com/event/1845740/ alloy movable figure. https://twitter.com/Dragonhorse_inc/status/1752617719898505449 The pre-order started on April 05, 2024. It will include the Bizen Osafune, Stage 3 Specification Progressive Knife, Exterminate Magoroku Sword, Powerd 8, Spear of Lucretius, effect parts, 5 pairs of hands and a stand. https://twitter.com/Dragonhorse_inc/status/1774965180843307453 https://twitter.com/Dragonhorse_inc/status/1774966153846407480 

On 10 August 2025, Dragonhorse Inc. announced a new version of the previous figure, now with metallic colors and a new equipment, the Counter Sword with sheath. It was scheduled to be released in Mid-November 2025 for 33,000 yen (excluding tax). https://x.com/Dragonhorse_inc/status/1954724562547229068 

Trivia

It made the debut in Pachinko machines in Neon Genesis Evangelion ~Roar to the Future~ on December 20, 2021.
